mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_favorite (user_id, product_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT product_id FROM user_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
